2604.01563.title: Does Your Optimizer Care How You Normalize? Normalization-Optimizer Coupling in LLM Training
2604.01563.paper_summary: In LLM training, normalization layers and optimizers are typically treated as independent design choices. In a 3x2 factorial at 1B parameters and 1000 training steps, we show this assumption can fail: Dynamic Erf (Derf; Chen & Liu, 2025) suffers a large negative interaction with Muon (Jordan, 2024), with its gap to RMSNorm growing from +0.31 nats under AdamW to +0.97 under Muon, approximately three times larger. Dynamic Tanh (DyT; Zhu et al., 2025), included as a bounded-normalizer control, shows no such penalty. Our evidence points to two failure modes of erf under Muon's faster spectral-norm growth: saturation (lossy compression) and scale blindness (discarding activation magnitude). An EMA-blend that reintroduces running scale estimates recovers ~84% of the gap. Separately, reducing Derf's alpha from its published default (0.5 to 0.3) recovers ~80% by keeping erf in its near-linear regime, where it approximately preserves relative scale; this setting is not the published default of Chen & Liu (2025). Using Derf's published default alpha with Muon incurs a 0.66-nat interaction penalty without producing NaNs or divergence, making the failure easy to miss in short pilot runs.
2604.01563.paper_summary_zh: 在LLM訓練中，正規化層和優化器通常被視為獨立的設計選擇。<lb/>在1B參數和1000訓練步驟的3x2因子實驗中，我們顯示這一假設可能會失效：動態誤差函數（Derf；Chen & Liu, 2025）與Muon（Jordan, 2024）之間存在較大的負交互作用，其與RMSNorm的差距從AdamW下的+0.31 nats增長至Muon下的+0.97，約大三倍。<lb/>作為有界正規化控制的動態雙曲正切（DyT；Zhu et al., 2025）並未顯示出這樣的懲罰。<lb/>我們的證據指向在Muon的更快光譜範數增長下，erf的兩種失效模式：飽和（有損壓縮）和尺度盲（丟棄激活幅度）。<lb/>一種重新引入運行尺度估計的EMA混合方法恢復了約84%的差距。<lb/>另外，將Derf的alpha從其已發表的默認值（0.5調整至0.3）恢復了約80%，因為這樣可以使erf保持在其接近線性的範疇內，並大致保持相對尺度；這一設置並不是Chen & Liu（2025）所發表的默認值。<lb/>使用Derf已發表的默認alpha與Muon結合會產生0.66-nat的交互懲罰，而不會產生NaNs或發散，使得在短期試點運行中容易忽略這一失敗。
2604.01563.author: Abdelrahman Abouzeid et.al.
